top_stories.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
top_stories.description: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.
top_stories.author: Kirsten Korosec
top_stories.content: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

top_stories.title: Prompting Amazon Nova 2 for content moderation
top_stories.description: In this post, you learn how to prompt Amazon Nova 2 Lite for content moderation using structured and free-form approaches, grounded in the MLCommons AILuminate Assessment Standard. The prompting techniques use the AILuminate taxonomy as an example, but they work equally well with your own custom moderation policy. You can swap in your own category definitions and the prompt structure stays the same. We also benchmark the content moderation capabilities of Amazon Nova 2 Lite against several...
top_stories.author: Adewale Akinfaderin
top_stories.content: In this post, you learn how to prompt Amazon Nova 2 Lite for content moderation using structured and free-form approaches, grounded in the MLCommons AILuminate Assessment Standard. The prompting techniques use the AILuminate taxonomy as an example, but they work equally well with your own custom moderation policy. You can swap in your own category definitions and the prompt structure stays the same. We also benchmark the content moderation capabilities of Amazon Nova 2 Lite against several...

top_stories.title: Build an AI-powered recruitment assistant using Amazon Bedrock
top_stories.description: In this post, we demonstrate how to build an AI-powered recruitment assistant using Amazon Bedrock that brings efficiencies to candidate evaluation, generates personalized interview questions, and provides data-driven insights for human hiring decisions. This post presents a reference architecture for learning purposes — not a production-ready solution. Amazon Bedrock and the AWS services used here are general-purpose tools that customers can combine to support a wide variety of use cases,...
top_stories.author: Puneeth Komaragiri
top_stories.content: In this post, we demonstrate how to build an AI-powered recruitment assistant using Amazon Bedrock that brings efficiencies to candidate evaluation, generates personalized interview questions, and provides data-driven insights for human hiring decisions. This post presents a reference architecture for learning purposes — not a production-ready solution. Amazon Bedrock and the AWS services used here are general-purpose tools that customers can combine to support a wide variety of use cases,...

top_stories.title: Vera Arrives: NVIDIA’s First CPU Built for Agents Lands at Top AI Labs
top_stories.description: The first NVIDIA Vera CPUs arrived at three of the world's leading AI labs on Friday — Anthropic in San Francisco, OpenAI in Mission Bay, SpaceXAI in Palo Alto — followed by a delivery to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure in Santa Clara on Monday. NVIDIA Vice President of Hyperscale and High-Performance Computing Ian Buck hand-delivered them.
top_stories.author: Ian Finder
top_stories.content: The first NVIDIA Vera CPUs arrived at three of the world's leading AI labs on Friday — Anthropic in San Francisco, OpenAI in Mission Bay, SpaceXAI in Palo Alto — followed by a delivery to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure in Santa Clara on Monday. NVIDIA Vice President of Hyperscale and High-Performance Computing Ian Buck hand-delivered them.

top_stories.title: Our response to the TanStack npm supply chain attack
top_stories.description: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI is strengthening defenses against evolving software supply chain threats.
top_stories.content: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack, outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates, and explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026. Learn what happened, what was affected, and how OpenAI is strengthening defenses against evolving software supply chain threats.
